items.name: freecodecamp
items.description:
Free interactive platform for learning web development and programming.
Covers HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python, and more through hands-on practice.
Includes projects and certifications to build real-world coding skills.

items.name: C#: From Zero To Hero
items.description:
Structured learning path for mastering C# from basics to advanced concepts.
Includes explanations, examples, and practical coding exercises.
Useful for building strong fundamentals in object-oriented programming.

items.name: geeksforgeeks
items.description:
Computer science learning platform covering data structures, algorithms, and programming concepts.
Includes tutorials, coding problems, and interview preparation material.
Useful for strengthening problem-solving and technical fundamentals.

items.name: devdocs
items.description:
Developer reference tool for official documentation across programming languages and frameworks.
Enables quick lookup of APIs, functions, and syntax in one unified search interface.
Useful for real-time coding, debugging, and development workflow efficiency.

items.name: leetCode
items.description:
Platform for practicing coding problems and interview questions.
Focuses on algorithms, data structures, and problem-solving skills.
Widely used for software engineering interview preparation.

items.name: Codewars
items.description:
Gamified coding challenge platform with increasing difficulty levels.
Helps improve logic, syntax, and problem-solving through practice.
Supports multiple programming languages and community solutions.
